title: Method and apparatus for encoding and decoding a picture
abstract: A method and an apparatus for encoding a picture are disclosed. For at least one block of a picture to encode, a block predictor is determined (22) for a decoded first component (21) of said at least one block, from a reconstructed region of a first component of said picture. At least one second component of said at least one block is then encoded (23) by predicting said at least one second component from a second component of said block predictor. Corresponding decoding method and apparatus are disclosed.
claims:
Claims 1 . A method for encoding a picture comprising, for at least one block of said picture: - determining (22) a block predictor for a decoded first component of said block, from a reconstructed region of a first component of said picture, - encoding (23) at least one second component of said block by predicting said at least one second component from a second component of said block predictor. 2. An apparatus for encoding a picture comprising: a memory, and a processor, configured to determine a block predictor for a decoded first component of said block, from a reconstructed region of a first component of said picture, and encode at least one second component of said block by predicting said at least one second component from a second component of said block predictor. 3. The method according to claim 1 or the apparatus of claim 2, wherein determining a block predictor of said decoded first component comprises: - selecting (221 ) said block predictor by minimizing a distortion measure between said decoded first component of said block and a first component of a block in the reconstructed region of the first component of said picture. 4. The method according to any one of claims 1 or 3 or the apparatus according to any one of claims 2 or 3, wherein said first component of the block is encoded (20) using a spatial prediction. 5. The method according to any one of claims 1 , 3 or 4 further comprising: or the apparatus according to any one of claims 2, 3 or 4, further configured for: - encoding (24, 27) at least one third component of said block by predicting said at least one third component from a third component of said block predictor. 6. The method according to any one of claims 1 , 3 or 4 further comprising or the apparatus according to any one of claims 2, 3 or 4, further configured for: - decoding (25) said second component of said block, - determining (26) another block predictor by minimizing a difference between said decoded first component of said block and a first component of a block in the reconstructed region of 

 the first component of said picture and a difference between said decoded second component of of said block and a second component of a block in a reconstructed region of a second component of said picture, - encoding (27) at least one third component of said block by predicting said at least one third component of said block from a third component of said another block predictor. 7. The method according to any one of claims 1 or 3 to 6 further comprising or the apparatus according to any one of claims 2 or 3 to 6, further configured for, for a block subsequent to said block: - encoding (30) data, said data indicating that a second component of said subsequent block is encoded before a first component of said subsequent block, - encoding (32) said first component of said subsequent block by using a predictor block determined according to a reconstructed second component of said subsequent block. 8. A method for decoding a picture from a coded bitstream comprising: - determining (50) a block predictor for a decoded first component of a block of the picture, from a reconstructed region of a first component of said picture, - decoding (51 ) at least one second component of said block by predicting said at least one second component of said block from a second component of said block predictor. 9. An apparatus for decoding a picture from a coded bitstream comprising: a memory, and a processor, configured to: determine a block predictor for a decoded first component of a block of the picture, from a reconstructed region of a first component of said picture, and decode at least one second component of said block by predicting said at least one second component of said block from a second component of said block predictor. 10. The method according to claim 8 or the apparatus according to claim 9, wherein determining a block predictor of said decoded first component comprises: - selecting (221 ) said block predictor by minimizing a distortion measure between said decoded first component and a first component of a block in the reconstructed region of the first component of said picture. 1 1 . The method according to any one of claims 8 or 10 or the apparatus according to any one of claims 9 or 10, wherein said first component of the block is decoded using a spatial prediction. 12. The method according to any one of claims 8, 10 or 1 1 further comprising or the apparatus according to any one of claims 9 to 1 1 , further configured for: - decoding (52, 54) at least one third component of said block by predicting said at least one third component of said block from a third component of said block predictor. 13. The method according to any one of claims 8, 10 or 1 1 further comprising: or the apparatus according to any one of claims 9 to 1 1 , further configured for: - determining (26) another block predictor by minimizing a difference between said reconstructed first component of said block and a first component of a block in the reconstructed region of the first component of said picture and a difference between said reconstructed second component of the block and a second component of a block in a reconstructed region of the second component of said picture, - decoding (54) at least one third component of said block by predicting said at least one third component of said block from a first component and a second component of said another block predictor. 14. The method according to any one of claims 8 or 10 to 13 further comprising or the apparatus according to any one of claims 9 or 10 to 13, further configured for, for a block subsequent to the current block: - decoding (60) data from said bitstream, said data indicating that a second component of said subsequent block is encoded before a first component of said subsequent block, - decoding (62) said first component of said subsequent block by using a predictor block determined according to a decoded second component of said subsequent block. 15. A computer program comprising software code instructions for performing the method according to any one of claims 1 or 3 to 7 or to any one of claims 8 or 10 to 14, when the computer program is executed by said processor. 16. A bitstream representative of a coded picture comprising, for at least one block of said picture: - coded data representative of a first component of said block, - coded data representative of a second component of said block, - coded data indicating that said second component of said block is predicted by a second component of a block predictor, said block predictor being determined according to said first component of said block previously reconstructed. 17. The bitstream according to claim 16, further comprising, for at least a subsequent block of said block: - coded data indicating that a second component of said subsequent block is encoded before a first component of said subsequent block, - coded data representative of said second component of said subsequent block, and - coded data representative of said first component of said subsequent block, said first component being encoded using a prediction from a first component of a predictor block, said predictor block being determined according to the second component of said subsequent block previously reconstructed.
